title: Verify that, delete-token API for credit cards request response is successful
Verify that, a card token cannot be deleted without authentication
Verify that, attempting to delete a token linked to an active subscription retrieves an error message
Verify that, attempting to delete a card token linked to an active payment plans retrieves an error message
Verify that, a clear error message is displayed when card token cannot be deleted from the Wallet
Verify that, all types of cards can be deleted via API
Verify that, once a deleted card token is removed, the details are also removed from the Wallet DB
